The '''Raid on Spearhead''' was the last major battle in which the unified [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] tribes attacked and destroyed [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rogoe/Legends|Rogoe's]] city of [[Spearhead/Legends|Spearhead]].

==Lead-up==
Boss [[Gallo/Legends|Gallo]] had unified the tribes against [[Rogoe/Legends|Rogoe]], and was preparing to launch a massive attack on Rogoe's fortress city of [[Spearhead/Legends|Spearhead]]. [[Marsune (Gungan)|Marsune]] made contact with the [[Bongomeken Collective]] and contracted them to build a large navy for Gallo. Upon doing so, the attack on Spearhead commenced. Gallo's forces also allied with a [[Bursa/Legends|bursa]] tribe.

==The Battle==
Gallo led his militiagungs into a fierce battle with Rogoe's forces at the gates of Spearhead. Battering his way through, and sustaining heavy losses, he got to [[Rogoe's keep]], and destroyed it, thereby claiming the land of Spearhead.

==Aftermath==
Gallo would then name the city [[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]], a city that stood for peace, not war.

==Behind the scenes==
The Battle of Spearhead appears in the third mission of the Gungan campaign in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']]. The game's [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] provides a layout of the battle and suggests ways to defeat Spearhead's defense. The player has the option of helping a bursa tribe; this article assumes the player did so.
